title: DecisionRecord
description: Durable record of architecture, product, or escalation decisions. Replaces ephemeral debate comments with structured decisions.

context.description: Why this decision was needed — the problem or trigger

decision.description: The chosen option and what it means concretely

reasoning.description: Why this option was chosen over alternatives

trade_offs.description: What we're giving up or accepting as risk

decided_by.description: Agent who made the final call (e.g., 'product-authority', 'architecture-authority')

related_task_id.description: TaskContract ID this decision relates to (if any)

supersedes.description: ID of a previous decision this one replaces (if any)
